title: 12PCS Artificial Gerbera Flower Single Stem Bloom Bouquet Plastic Silk Fake Decorative Flora Outdoor Indoor Home Garden Office Hotel Wedding Party Green
features: Material: The artificial Gerbera flower was made of silk cloth, the stem was made of metal wire wrapped by plastic,12pcs/ bouquet
Size: flower head diameter 3.94 inches/10cm, whole height 12.2 inches/31cm
Random modeling: The stem can be bent at or trimmed with scissors easily as needed

Suitable for the scene: living room, bedroom, bathroom, kitchen, dining room, garden and other home environment; office, hotel, restaurant and other public environment;wedding and party;DIY flower basket, flower wall, wreath and other floral artwork

Easy to care: as the bouquet is squeezed during transportation, please gently open the petals with your fingers; if the bouquet dusty for using a period of time, please gently sweep the petals with a soft hair brush dipped in water, and then dry them in a cool place
description: Product Description Pretty artificial gerbera bouquet is displayed in living room. The lively and lovely Gerbera will bring infinite joy to your life.At home, adding a bunch of Gerbera will make the room full of vitality and bring you a good mood! HASWITDA 12PCS Artificial Gerbera Flower Single Stem Bloom Bouquet Gerbera bunches can be used for weddings, birthday parties, anniversary celebrations and other occasions. The flowers will always present the most brilliant and beautiful posture and easily add color to your home. When you need DIY to make flower basket and other flower art works, gerbera can embellish your works to make them unique.
